rationale: The user requested a 'steampunk' aesthetic for a book discovery app. This requires deep, rich materials (leather, brass, copper) mixed with Victorian typography and parchment textures. The dark theme serves as a moody, immersive backdrop for glowing metallic accents and vintage book covers.

background.description: Deepest obsidian brown (aged leather) for the main background. Surfaces are lighter worn leather tones.

parchment.description: Used specifically for the 'inside' of the cards (Summary and Technical details) to contrast heavily with the dark app background, mimicking old paper.

accents.primary_description: Burnished Brass / Amber glow for primary CTAs and active states.
accents.secondary_description: Rusty Copper / Deep Mahogany for secondary highlights.

typography.description: Parchment tint for text on dark leather backgrounds. Deep Sepia Ink for text on parchment backgrounds.

strategies.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black tracking-tighter text-[#C48B47] drop-shadow-[0_2px_4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]

rules: Headings must use Playfair Display to reinforce the Victorian/Classic aesthetic.
Body text MUST use IBM Plex Sans for optimal legibility, especially for the 1-minute summaries.
Never use default generic sans-serif (Inter) for headers.

spacing_and_layout.scale: Tailwind standard scale, but favor generous padding (p-6 to p-8) inside parchment cards to feel like book margins.
spacing_and_layout.bento_mode: Card-centric absolute layout for the Tinder stack.
rules: The main interface is a central stack of cards. The container should be flex, centered, filling the screen minus nav.
Mobile-first constraint: The card stack MUST NOT exceed 75vh to allow room for bottom navigation or absolute buttons.
Inside the card (Ficha Tecnica or Summary), use a standard 1-column flow with gap-4.

micro_themes.steampunk_button: rounded-full bg-[#120E0A] border-2 border-[#C48B47]/60 text-[#C48B47] shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.6),inset_0_2px_4px_rgba(196,139,71,0.3)] hover:bg-[#221A13] hover:border-[#C48B47] transition-all duration-200

components.tinder_stack: Use framer-motion for the swipe interactions. Drag constraints, dragElastic=0.6. Use useTransform to map drag x/y to rotation and opacity (e.g., swiping right rotates slightly clockwise and reveals a green 'Favorite' stamp).
components.audio_player: A prominent circular 'Victorian Gear' button using the 'steampunk_button' micro-theme. Place it prominently on the 1-minute summary view.
components.buy_buttons: Use brand colors but muted to fit the theme (e.g., Amazon Orange but slightly brassy). Use standard Shadcn Button layout but apply custom borders and inner shadows.
components.ficha_tecnica: A grid (grid-cols-2 gap-4) displaying Author, Year, Genre, Pages. Use overline styles for the labels and serif font for the values.

interactions_and_motion.swipe_physics: Spring physics: stiffness: 120, damping: 20. Must feel heavy and mechanical.
interactions_and_motion.card_flip_slide: When swiping Up/Down to reveal Ficha or Summary, transition the card background to the parchment theme and crossfade the content.
interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Buttons should lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase their inner amber glow (box-shadow).

background_texture.description: Dark leather texture. Apply as an absolute background with opacity-30 and mix-blend-multiply over the #120E0A base.

gears_texture.description: Use as a subtle overlay in empty states or login screen with opacity-20 and grayscale filter.

placeholder_books.description: Vintage green book. Use in the Tinder stack.
Little Women vintage cover. Use in the Tinder stack.

media.icons: Use lucide-react. Standard mapping: Heart (Favorite), X (Discard), FileText (Summary), Info (Ficha Técnica), Headphones (Audio), ShoppingCart (Buy), Settings/Menu (Gears).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure the parchment background (#F4ECD8) uses the dark sepia ink (#2A1E15) to maintain APCA readability. For the dark leather cards, text MUST be the bright parchment color (#E8DCC2).
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: Add data-testid to swipe_card, btn_like, btn_discard, btn_details, btn_summary, btn_play_audio, btn_buy_amazon, btn_language_toggle.
accessibility_and_testing.reduced_motion: Wrap framer-motion components with reduced motion checks if possible, though the core app mechanic is gesture-driven.
